{{Infobox artifact
| name = The Scythe
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[The Scythe]] is an item that needs to be recovered.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[The Scythe]] is a long, curved blade resembling an obsidian scimitar.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Scythe]] is [[Ozriel]]'s weapon.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Scythe]]'s authority clashed with the person holding it.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
